text:
There once was a young boy named Bob who loved the ocean. Every weekend, Bob would bike to a nearby bay and spend hours surfing the waves. One sunny morning, while bobbing on a big wave, Bob lost his balance and plunged into the surf.

Splash!

Bob surfaced gasping for air. Immediately, he felt the cold water prickling his skin. He looked around and there was a strange creature bobbing in the surf.

It had wide eyes, floppy ears, and a long, fluffy tail.

"Are you my lost dolphin?" Bob gasped.

The mysterious creature laughed a deep, echoing hum.

Bob nodded. "Could you... could you come with me? There must be other people out there who love dolphins."

The dolphin tilted its head. "I've never been indoors..."

Bob laughed. "Well, maybe I have some old fisherman's nets here that'll hold us!"

He threw his clothes aside and dove into the surf, wrapping the net around the dolphin.
